title: Smart Data Models - OpenStreetMap / OSMBuildingPart
description: A part or section of a building from OpenStreetMap tagged with building:part=*. Used to represent buildings with varying heights, roof shapes, or materials across different sections, enabling 3D building visualisation (Simple 3D Buildings standard).

type.description: Property. NGSI Entity type. It has to be OSMBuildingPart

osmId.description: Property. The original OpenStreetMap element integer identifier. Model:'https://wiki.openstreetmap.org/wiki/Elements'

osmType.description: Property. The type of the original OpenStreetMap element. Model:'https://wiki.openstreetmap.org/wiki/Elements'

osmLastModified.description: Property. Timestamp of the last modification of the OSM element.

buildingPartType.description: Property. The OSM building:part tag value. Typically 'yes' or a specific type label for the architectural section. Model:'https://wiki.openstreetmap.org/wiki/Key:building:part'

buildingLevels.description: Property. Number of above-ground floors in this part of the building. Model:'https://wiki.openstreetmap.org/wiki/Key:building:levels'

buildingHeight.description: Property. Total height of this building part in metres. Units:'m'. Model:'https://wiki.openstreetmap.org/wiki/Key:height'

minHeight.description: Property. Height above ground at which this building part starts, in metres. Used for overhangs and elevated sections. Units:'m'. Model:'https://wiki.openstreetmap.org/wiki/Key:min_height'

minLevel.description: Property. Floor level at which this building part starts. Used for indoor mapping. Model:'https://wiki.openstreetmap.org/wiki/Key:min_level'

roofShape.description: Property. Shape of the roof on this building part. Enum:'flat, gabled, hipped, half-hipped, pyramidal, gambrel, mansard, dome, skillion, round, saltbox, onion, cone'. Model:'https://wiki.openstreetmap.org/wiki/Key:roof:shape'

roofMaterial.description: Property. Primary material of the roof surface on this part. Model:'https://wiki.openstreetmap.org/wiki/Key:roof:material'

roofColour.description: Property. Colour of the roof on this part, expressed as a CSS colour name or hex code. Model:'https://wiki.openstreetmap.org/wiki/Key:roof:colour'

buildingColour.description: Property. Colour of the facade of this building part, expressed as a CSS colour name or hex code. Model:'https://wiki.openstreetmap.org/wiki/Key:building:colour'

buildingMaterial.description: Property. Primary facade or structural material of this building part. Model:'https://wiki.openstreetmap.org/wiki/Key:building:material'

refBuilding.description: Relationship. URI reference to the parent OSMBuilding entity this part belongs to.

seeAlso.description: Property. List of URIs pointing to additional resources about this item.
